overview: National Institute of Technology Hamirpur (NIT Hamirpur / NITH), located on Anu Road, Hamirpur, Himachal Pradesh, is a premier autonomous public technical university established in 1986 as a Regional Engineering College (REC). It was later elevated to an Institute of National Importance under the NIT Act. Spread across a scenic 320-acre pine-forested campus, the institute is recognized for its strong engineering, architecture, and research programs across northern India.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance under the NIT Act; recognized by UGC and Ministry of Education.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Approximately ₹41,666 per year after 2/3 tuition fee remission

placements.companiesVisited: 60+ recruiters participated in the 2025 placement drive

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through JoSAA/CSAB counseling for B.Tech and B.Arch programs, while postgraduate admissions are based on GATE and institute-level counseling.
admissions.importantDates: Admission timelines follow JoSAA, CSAB, and CCMT schedules for respective academic sessions.

campus.hostelFees: ₹24,000 – ₹32,000 per annum depending on room type
campus.specialNote: The campus is surrounded by pine forests and is widely known for its scenic environment and strong technical infrastructure.

scholarships.name: Top Class Education Scheme for SC Students
scholarships.benefit: Full tuition fee coverage, living expenses, and computer assistance

scholarships.name: Post-Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
scholarships.benefit: Financial support through National Scholarship Portal (NSP)

scholarships.name: Merit-Cum-Means Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Financial aid and tuition concessions for meritorious students

scholarships.name: M.Tech GATE Stipend
scholarships.benefit: ₹12,400 per month fellowship for eligible GATE-qualified students

contact.address: National Institute of Technology Hamirpur, Anu Road, Hamirpur, Himachal Pradesh – 177005, India
